headline: What Edison International (EIX)'s New Independent Utility Veteran Director Means For Shareholders
summary: On April 23, 2026, Edison International and Southern California Edison elected M. Susan Hardwick as an independent director, adding more than 35 years of leadership across regulated utilities, energy and professional services to their boards. Hardwick’s background in utility operations, safety, finance, capital allocation and regulatory affairs could influence how Edison International approaches grid investment, risk oversight and long-term planning. Next, we’ll examine how Hardwick’s deep...
